name: TeachMe.To Golf Lessons - Swing Factory
address: 742 S Hill St suite 500 STE 1, Los Angeles, CA 90014
about: TeachMe.To Golf Lessons - Swing Factory operates as a platform connecting golfers with instructors, though the specific venue page was not found. The parent company TeachMe.To facilitates private and group lessons across various sports including golf, tennis, and pickleball. Founded in 2022, they offer a booking experience with over 250 lessons delivered daily. The service is designed for individuals of all skill levels, from beginners to experienced players, focusing on providing accessible and structured learning opportunities through certified coaches.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible booking system for private lessons
Structured beginner packages to build fundamentals
Verified reviews from real beginner golfers

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental availability, so it's recommended to bring your own equipment or inquire with your instructor directly.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks to the venue?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food and drink services on-site, and a BYOB policy is not specified.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session typically take?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on simulator session durations for 18-hole rounds.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The platform offers lessons for all skill levels including juniors, but specific kid-friendly amenities or policies are not detailed.
